'''Horodi''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who served aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XW:OSG" />

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], acting under the influence of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], promoted aggression in Horodi and several other rookie pilots, hoping that he could create a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of pilots, guided by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], who would be unstoppable against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Farlander selected Horodi, along with [[Casal Marskan]], to assist him in a mission to recapture a [[Ethar|pair]] of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] which had been captured by the Empire. Both Horodi and Marskan were killed during the mission when their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] were destroyed while fighting against enemy [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]].<ref name="XW:OSG" />

Farlander had been unaware of the nature of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] and initially considered their deaths as proof that both pilots were unworthy of the Force.<ref name="XW:OSG" />
